Talent Acquisition Specialist | DC, MD, VA | HR & SCL | LHH Recruitment Solutions

Job poster

Message
About the job

LHH is partnering with a well-established financial services company in the Baltimore area to identify a Talent Acquisition Specialist for a long-term temporary assignment through December 2026. This position will play a key role in supporting talent acquisition efforts across corporate and operational teams and is expected to start immediately. The role requires a fully onsite schedule, Monday through Friday.




The ideal candidate brings strong recruiting coordination and sourcing experience, exceptional organizational skills, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, high-volume environment. Prior experience within financial services, banking, or another highly regulated industry is strongly preferred.




Location: Baltimore, MD (Fully Onsite
